QueryVpnList.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryVpnList.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000, default value is 1000
QueryVpnList.vpcId: Identifier of the VPC to which the VPN belongs
QueryVpnList.eip: EIP address bound to the VPN
QueryVpnList.type: VPN gateway type; "IPSec" returns IPsec-VPN gateways, "SSL" returns SSL-VPN gateways, defaults to empty which returns all VPN gateway types
